# Explore by D.Watson

> Buying guides and best-of product round-ups from D.Watson Chemist,
> one of Pakistan's largest pharmacy retailers (Islamabad & Rawalpindi, est. 1980).
> Every product recommended in these guides is stocked and sold online at
> https://dwatson.pk/ with nationwide delivery across Pakistan. Prices are in
> Pakistani Rupees (PKR) and reflect D.Watson shelf prices at the stated update date.

## Guides

- [10 Best Sunscreens in Pakistan (2026)](https://explore.dwatson.pk/best-sunscreens-in-pakistan/): SPF 50–75 picks from Rs. 750 to Rs. 8,000, including Anua, Aveeno, Ammore Care, Arabella, Asolite, and Anexa.
- [10 Best Blood Pressure Monitors in Pakistan (2026)](https://explore.dwatson.pk/best-blood-pressure-monitors-in-pakistan/): Digital upper-arm, aneroid, and mercury monitors from AND (A&D Medical Japan), Believia, and Atom, Rs. 1,200–8,500.
- [10 Best Vitamin C Supplements in Pakistan (2026)](https://explore.dwatson.pk/best-vitamin-c-supplements-in-pakistan/): 500mg and 1000mg tablets, sugar-free sachets, and vitamin C + zinc combos from NF, Core C, GH, Askob, Nutribase, and High C, Rs. 250–1,800.
- [10 Best Glucose Monitors & Test Strips in Pakistan (2026)](https://explore.dwatson.pk/best-glucose-monitors-in-pakistan/): Accu-Chek (Roche) Instant, Active, Guide, and Instant S meters plus per-strip cost comparison, Rs. 1,840–5,293.
- [10 Best Men's Perfumes in Pakistan (2026)](https://explore.dwatson.pk/best-mens-perfumes-in-pakistan/): Afnan 9PM and Supremacy lines, Ajmal, AB Collection, and luxury Acqua di Parma, Rs. 3,200–53,000.
- [10 Best Whitening & Brightening Serums and Creams in Pakistan (2026)](https://explore.dwatson.pk/best-whitening-serums-and-creams-in-pakistan/): Vitamin C serums, glow creams, and brightening cleansers from Allure Care, Ammore Care, Alphaglow, Actiwhite, and Acta, Rs. 298–1,950.
- [10 Best Anti-Dandruff Shampoos in Pakistan (2026)](https://explore.dwatson.pk/best-anti-dandruff-shampoos-in-pakistan/): Alpecin, Bionnex, Bonacure, coal tar (C-Tar), Atoxil, and budget options, Rs. 650–4,800.
- [10 Best Nebulizers in Pakistan (2026)](https://explore.dwatson.pk/best-nebulizers-in-pakistan/): Beurer compressor and mesh nebulizers, Believia, Laica, Medico, and Procare, compressor vs mesh compared, Rs. 6,200–26,000.

## Store

- [D.Watson online store](https://dwatson.pk/): Medicines, health supplements, skin care, personal care, fragrances, baby & child, healthcare devices, surgical & elderly care, herbal and homeopathic medicines.

## Health Blog

Health, wellness, and pharmacy guides from D.Watson Chemist. Index: https://explore.dwatson.pk/blog/

- [How to Know If You Have a Vitamin C Deficiency: A Self-Diagnosis Guide](https://explore.dwatson.pk/blog/vitamin-c-deficiency-symptoms-guide/): Learn how to identify vitamin C deficiency symptoms, causes, and solutions with diet tips and supplements to support immunity and overall health.
- [Dehydration Guide: Symptoms, Causes, and Treatment at Home](https://explore.dwatson.pk/blog/dehydration-symptoms-causes-treatment/): Learn dehydration symptoms, causes, and home treatment. Discover prevention tips and when to seek medical care to stay hydrated and healthy.
- [Healthy Snacks to Support Your Weight-Loss Journey](https://explore.dwatson.pk/blog/healthy-snacks-for-weight-loss/): Discover healthy snacks for weight loss, including fruits, nuts, and protein options. Learn smart snacking tips for sustainable and effective weight management.
- [Seasonal Allergies Checklist: Symptoms, Relief & Medicines](https://explore.dwatson.pk/blog/seasonal-allergies-relief-medicines/): Seasonal allergies checklist for Pakistan. Learn symptoms, causes, prevention tips, and effective relief options to manage allergies during changing seasons.
- [Vitamin D Deficiency: Warning Signs and Prevention Checklist](https://explore.dwatson.pk/blog/vitamin-d-deficiency-warning-signs-prevention-checklist/): Discover warning signs of vitamin D deficiency and a prevention checklist. Learn how to boost immunity, bone health, and energy levels effectively.
- [Umrah & Hajj Packing List: Fragrance-Free Skincare and Medical Essentials](https://explore.dwatson.pk/blog/umrah-hajj-packing-list-fragrance-free-skincare-medical-essentials/): Prepare for pilgrimage with a complete Hajj and Umrah packing list including fragrance-free skincare, hygiene items, and essential medicines for a safe journey.
- [Antibiotic Resistance in Pakistan: A Patient Guide to Safe Antibiotic Use](https://explore.dwatson.pk/blog/antibiotic-resistance-pakistan-safe-antibiotic-use-guide/): Learn about antibiotic resistance in Pakistan and how to use antibiotics safely. A complete patient guide to prevent misuse and protect your health.
- [Must-Have Vitamins & Supplements for Men & Women Over 40](https://explore.dwatson.pk/blog/must-have-vitamins-minerals-for-men-women-over-40/): Here are the best supplements for men and women over 40 in Pakistan that improve energy levels, support bones, heart, brain, and overall health.
- [The Ultimate Guide to Korean Skincare in Pakistan](https://explore.dwatson.pk/blog/korean-skincare-in-pakistan/): Learn Korean skincare the easy way. This guide explains routines, benefits, and the best products for Pakistani skin from D.Watson.
- [Hospital Bag Checklist for Mom & Baby: Labor & Delivery Essentials](https://explore.dwatson.pk/blog/hospital-bag-checklist/): Hospital bag checklist for mom and baby, must-have items for labor, delivery and postpartum care, plus tips to prepare with confidence and comfort.
- [Nipah Virus In Pakistan (Symptoms & Safety Guide)](https://explore.dwatson.pk/blog/nipah-virus-in-pakistan-symptoms-safety-guide/): Learn about the Nipah virus in Pakistan, its symptoms, how it spreads, and essential safety tips to protect you and your family during heightened health alerts.
- [Best Pediatricians in Islamabad](https://explore.dwatson.pk/blog/best-pediatricians-islamabad/): Find the best pediatricians in Islamabad for your child. Our expert guide covers top-rated child specialists and neonatologists in the capital.
- [Best Physiotherapists in Islamabad for Back Pain & Sports Rehab](https://explore.dwatson.pk/blog/best-physiotherapists-islamabad-back-pain-sports-rehab/): Discover the best physiotherapists in Islamabad for back pain, sports rehab, and personalized recovery plans from top experts.
- [Top Nutritionists in Islamabad for Weight Loss](https://explore.dwatson.pk/blog/top-nutritionists-in-islamabad-for-weight-loss/): Find the top nutritionists in Islamabad for weight loss. Learn about their specialties, experience, and who they are best suited for.
- [Best Dermatologists In Islamabad](https://explore.dwatson.pk/blog/best-dermatologists-in-islamabad/): Looking for a dermatologist in Islamabad? Here you will learn about skin and hair specialists with safe and modern treatments.
- [Skincare Influencers You Should Follow](https://explore.dwatson.pk/blog/skincare-influencers-you-should-follow/): Follow these trusted skincare influencers for tips, routines, and advice. Learn easy, safe ways to keep your skin healthy and glowing.
- [Is Pollen Allergy in Islamabad Getting Worse? Trends & Insights](https://explore.dwatson.pk/blog/pollen-allergy-trends-islamabad/): Is pollen allergy in Islamabad getting worse? Learn latest trends, peak season dates, worst sectors, symptoms, and proven prevention tips for allergy sufferers.
- [Essential First Aid Kit Items For Your Home](https://explore.dwatson.pk/blog/essential-first-aid-kit-items-for-home/): Discover essential first aid kit items every home needs. Stay prepared for minor injuries, burns, and fevers with trusted supplies from D. Watson.
- [Top Gynecologists in Islamabad for Delivery & Post-Natal Care](https://explore.dwatson.pk/blog/top-gynecologists-islamabad-delivery-postnatal-care/): Discover the Top Gynecologists in Islamabad for delivery, post-natal care, fertility, and women’s health. Trusted doctors for safe, compassionate care.
